category_sources: source_facts.description says SnapRAID is a backup program for disk arrays; official homepage describes parity-based disk-array recovery.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the product name SnapRAID.
docs_sources: Official SnapRAID site navigation links to Manual and FAQ pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/amadvance/snapraid, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official manual describe a command-line backup/redundancy tool for disk arrays using parity and integrity checks.
